title: RAG | Compliance-first Mutual Fund FAQ Assistant
description:
Shipped an AI prototype of a compliance-first Mutual Fund FAQ Assistant that leverages RAG to provide factual answers from official HDFC Mutual Fund documents. Built with privacy-first guardrails, intent classification, and PII redaction to prevent hallucinations, investment advice, and misuse of sensitive data.
Please note: Assistant is deployed on a free tier, when you use it, let that sleepyhead wake up in 30-40 seconds! ;)

title: n8n onboarding - A Product Teardown
description: n8n is one of the fastest-growing workflow automation platforms, combining visual workflows, AI orchestration, and developer-level flexibility. In this teardown, we’ll analyze how its onboarding experience helps users reach first value and where it can further simplify the path from curiosity to adoption.

title: Case study on ChatGPT's voice input usage
description:
This is a case study with insights on why users are not using Voice input on ChatGPT mobile, 
especially in India.

title: PRD for resolving Zepto's ETA Reliability issue
description:
Urban Zepto users ordering during peak demand windows are experiencing delivery times that significantly exceed the ETA shown in the app. The visible issue is not only that orders are late, but that the app continues to display aggressive short ETAs that users no longer trust.

Read my analysis and recommendations in this short PRD.

title: Football Data Analysis using SQL
description:
Much like the "Moneyball" scenario where baseball data was analyzed to make better player decisions, I used SQL queries to extract insights from a dataset of football players, teams, and their performance statistics. 
Goal was to help a football team’s management find patterns that can be used to make strategic decisions.
